title: Tollie's Megas
description: Fan-made mega evolutions of my own design! Requires Cobblemon and Mega Showdown
body:
## Tollie's Megas is a datapack that adds fan-made mega evolutions to Cobblemon 
The aim is to give mega evolutions that are made with love and passion to Pokémon that need/deserve one. As of now there's 3 added megas with more to come!

- [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) and [Cobblemon: Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown) are required for the datapack to work *at all*.
- Optionally, [Open Loader](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-loader) is recommended for the datapack to work straight from your instances datapacks folder without you having to install it in your world. (This will affect all your worlds) 

[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d26e2fff740fe1e97906437fa887c9e8e6e49cb.png)](https://discord.com/channels/1334216416617824386/1479749860126232646)

### Currently working on:
Not much, just playing Create

### Mega Stones
**Recipe type: Smithing Table**
